sentences.target: Ton chapeau te va super bien.

translations.fr: Ton chapeau te va super bien.
translations.en: Your hat looks really good on you.
translations.es: Tu sombrero te queda muy bien.
translations.de: Dein Hut steht dir richtig gut.
translations.it: Il tuo cappello ti sta benissimo.
translations.pt: Seu chapéu fica ótimo em você.
translations.he: הכובע שלך נראה ממש טוב עליך.
translations.vi: Cái mũ của bạn trông rất hợp với bạn.
translations.nl: Je hoed staat je echt goed.
translations.hu: Nagyon jól áll neked a kalapod.
translations.hi: तुम पर तुम्हारी टोपी बहुत अच्छी लगती है.
translations.el: Το καπέλο σου σου πάει πολύ.
translations.nb: Hatten din kler deg veldig godt.
translations.sv: Din hatt passar dig riktigt bra.
translations.ro: Pălăria ta îți vine foarte bine.
translations.da: Din hat klæder dig rigtig godt.
translations.ja: その帽子、すごく似合ってるよ。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), masculine singular, agreeing with 'chapeau'.
Common masculine noun; head of the noun phrase.
Clitic indirect object pronoun (2nd person singular) for the construction 'aller bien à quelqu'un' ('to suit someone').
3rd person singular present of 'aller'; with 'bien' forms an idiomatic evaluative predicate ('suits/looks good').
Colloquial intensifying adverb modifying 'bien'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'va'.

translations.yue: 我成日唔記得我嗰頂帽。
translations.he: אני תמיד שוכח את הכובע שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi luôn quên cái mũ của mình.
translations.hi: मैं हमेशा अपनी टोपी भूल जाता हूँ.

tokens.explanation: Elided subject clitic 'je' before a vowel-initial verb.
1st person singular present; main verb of the clause.
Frequency adverb modifying the verb 'oublie'.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular, agreeing with 'chapeau'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'oublie'.

sentences.target: On doit porter un chapeau au soleil.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa pɔʁte œ̃ ʃapo o sɔlɛj/

translations.fr: On doit porter un chapeau au soleil.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa pɔʁte œ̃ ʃapo o sɔlɛj/
translations.en: We should wear a hat in the sun.
translations.es: Deberíamos usar sombrero bajo el sol.
translations.de: Wir sollten in der Sonne einen Hut tragen.
translations.it: Dovremmo indossare un cappello sotto il sole.
translations.zh-Hans: 在太阳底下我们应该戴帽子。
translations.yue: 喺太陽底下我哋應該戴帽。
translations.ru: На солнце нам стоит носить шляпу.
translations.vi: Chúng ta nên đội mũ khi ở dưới nắng.
translations.ar: يجب أن نرتدي قبعة تحت الشمس.
translations.nl: We zouden in de zon een hoed moeten dragen.
translations.uk: На сонці нам слід носити капелюх.
translations.hi: धूप में हमें टोपी पहननी चाहिए.
translations.el: Στον ήλιο πρέπει να φοράμε καπέλο.
translations.nb: Vi bør bruke hatt i sola.
translations.id: Kita sebaiknya memakai topi saat di bawah sinar matahari.
translations.sv: Vi bör ha hatt i solen.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să purtăm o pălărie la soare.
translations.cs: Na slunci bychom měli nosit klobouk.
translations.da: Vi bør have hat på i solen.
translations.ja: 日差しの下では帽子をかぶったほうがいい。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun commonly used for 'we' in spoken French.
3rd person singular present of the modal verb 'devoir'; takes an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb serving as the complement to 'doit'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'chapeau'.
Common masculine noun; object of 'porter'.
Fused form of preposition 'à' + definite article 'le'; introduces the prepositional phrase 'au soleil'.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Elle pose son chapeau sur la table.
sentences.reading: /ɛl poz sɔ̃ ʃapo syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: Elle pose son chapeau sur la table.
translations.ipa: /ɛl poz sɔ̃ ʃapo syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: She puts her hat on the table.
translations.es: Ella pone su sombrero sobre la mesa.
translations.de: Sie legt ihren Hut auf den Tisch.
translations.it: Lei mette il suo cappello sul tavolo.
translations.ru: Она кладет свою шляпу на стол.
translations.pt: Ela coloca o chapéu dela na mesa.
translations.he: היא מניחה את הכובע שלה על השולחן.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đặt chiếc mũ của mình lên bàn.
translations.nl: Ze legt haar hoed op tafel.
translations.uk: Вона кладе свій капелюх на стіл.
translations.hi: वह अपनी टोपी मेज़ पर रखती है.
translations.pl: Ona kładzie swój kapelusz na stół.
translations.el: Βάζει το καπέλο της πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Hun legger hatten sin på bordet.
translations.id: Dia meletakkan topinya di atas meja.
translations.sv: Hon lägger sin hatt på bordet.
translations.ro: Ea își pune pălăria pe masă.
translations.da: Hun lægger sin hat på bordet.
translations.ja: 彼女は帽子をテーブルの上に置く。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine subject pronoun.
3rd person singular present; transitive verb taking 'son chapeau' as direct object.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular, agreeing with 'chapeau'; owner is 'Elle'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'pose'.
Preposition introducing the locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'table'.
Common feminine noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.
